ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape */,
  "shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the shape */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the shape was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the shape */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the shape belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the shape */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Source type of the shape data (e.g., CAD, physical measurement) */,
  "source_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source file if available */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the shape */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shape (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shapes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES shape_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shapes_source_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_file_id") REFERENCES shape_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shapes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shape_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape to which the metrics belong */,
  "circleness" REAL /* Value of circleness for the shape */,
  "squareness" REAL /* Value of squareness for the shape */,
  "symmetry" REAL /* Value of symmetry for the shape */,
  "convexity" REAL /* Value of convexity for the shape */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Value of eccentricity for the shape */,
  "analysis_setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis setting used for the metrics */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the metric record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the metric record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_metrics_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_metrics_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_metrics_analysis_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_setting_id") REFERENCES shape_analysis_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shape_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the category */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing analysis findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shape_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape to which the file belongs */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path for the shape data */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CAD, STL) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the file */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_files_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_files_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shape_analysis_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter for analysis */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the setting */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the setting */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_analysis_settings_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_analysis_settings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shape_metrics_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric associated with the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old value of the metric */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the metric */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_metrics_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_metrics_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES shape_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)
